rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in component implementation annexes for implementation-specific bindings like assignments.
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they define input/output ranges or use visible feature names.
generic_rules: Use annex agree blocks to encapsulate formal contracts within AADL models.
Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annexes at appropriate component or implementation scopes.
Avoid inserting unsafe Boolean-to-integer conversions in formal contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for general assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes for scope-specific bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE clauses that reference opaque Boolean or enumeration data without numeric scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
